- [ ] New designer profile (sources/designers/ + style-profiles/)

## Quality checklist

### For a new designer
- [ ] `sources/designers/<slug>.md` uses the source-designer template fields
- [ ] `style-profiles/<slug>.md` uses the style-profile template fields
- [ ] Style profile has hex palette with role percentages
- [ ] Typography spec includes family, weight, tracking behavior
- [ ] Composition section covers grid, focal point, negative space
- [ ] 7+ signature moves listed
- [ ] Tools section lists what the designer actually uses
- [ ] Mood / emotional register characterized
- [ ] "When to apply" has 3+ positive + 3+ anti scenarios
- [ ] Tactical instructions are 8-12 numbered imperatives an LLM can follow
- [ ] 3+ key references listed (with dates)
- [ ] Portfolio URLs verified working at time of submission
- [ ] `Last sync` date present

### For all changes
- [ ] I read CONTRIBUTING.md and accept the quality bar
- [ ] No copyrighted images included (descriptions + links only)
- [ ] Internal markdown links work (`../style-profiles/foo.md` etc.)
- [ ] External URLs tested at time of submission
- [ ] `SETUP.md` inventory updated if applicable
- [ ] Commit message describes the change in one line
